_comment: Copy to ~/.tanuki/config.json. Every key is optional — these are the built-in defaults (docs/tanuki-spec.md 'Configuration'). A per-target 'defaults' block in ~/.tanuki/scenarios/<target>.scenarios.json overrides this file; CLI flags override both.
_policy_source: optional, omit to disable (default). Example: "policy_source": {"path": "~/path/to/policy-repo", "files": ["GLOSSARY.md", "LESSONS.md"]} — up to 4 repo-relative .md files, read read-only and quoted as advisory context at the brief/decision pass only (specs/spec-policy-advisory).
